Document:
# Resomi
Resomi are a diminutive, avian-like species adapted to survival on their icy, ammonia-rich homeworld. Standing much shorter than most sapients, their light bones and downy plumage grant them both agility and vulnerability. Their bodies are built for the frozen wastes, but poorly suited to warmer climates, to the point hot temperatures become unbearable to them. Despite this, they have made a name for themselves in NT-operated stations and across the galactic strata by sheer spite, having originally developed their own means of space travel.
## Diet - Can eat raw meat.
## Benefits - Due to their [color=yellow]small stature[/color], they can [color=#1e90ff]fit inside duffel bags[/color]. - Thanks to their [color=yellow]ammonia-based blood[/color] and frigid evolution, they are [color=#1e90ff]completely immune to Cold damage and cold-based effects[/color].
## Drawbacks - Their [color=yellow]small stature[/color] makes them [color=#ec3a3a]take 15% more Brute, Slash and Piercing damage[/color]. - They [color=#ec3a3a]struggle to pull heavier species or objects[/color] due to their light weight. - Their [color=yellow]ammonia-based[/color] physiology means they [color=#ec3a3a]begin suffering from Heat at just 47°C[/color] and [color=#ec3a3a]take 30% more Heat damage[/color]. - Their unarmed attacks rely on [color=yellow]talons[/color], dealing [color=#ec3a3a]Slashing damage[/color].
